subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-03-03 in Paris
subcodes.first_line: They [the Covenant-breakers] have melted my bones. I treated them with exceeding kindness and forbearance; even when they took two coffers containing the writings of Baha'u'llah
subcodes.first_line_orig: استخوان مرا آب کردند با وجود آن همه محبّت و سلوک و مدارا که دو جا
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @growth of the Cause, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @rebellion and misdeeds of Mirza Yahya; the Azalis
